name: Amorphage Sloth
name_jp: アモルファージ・ノーテス
desc:
[ Pendulum Effect ] 
While you control an "Amorphage" monster, neither player can add cards from their Deck to their hand except by drawing them. Once per turn, during your Standby Phase, Tribute 1 monster or destroy this card.

[ Monster Effect ] 
Neither player can Special Summon monsters from the Extra Deck, except "Amorphage" monsters.
pend_eff: While you control an "Amorphage" monster, neither player can add cards from their Deck to their hand except by drawing them. Once per turn, during your Standby Phase, Tribute 1 monster or destroy this card.
mnst_eff: Neither player can Special Summon monsters from the Extra Deck, except "Amorphage" monsters.
eff: Neither player can Special Summon monsters from the Extra Deck, except "Amorphage" monsters.

action: Prevents adding cards from Deck to hand
summoning: Restricts the player's Special Summons to archetype specific monsters
Restricts the player's Special Summons from the Extra Deck
